1843.reason: [When the right parenthesis is missing, the error line number is incorrectly reported. The problem description states that the error line number should correspond to the line where the last non-terminal before the right parenthesis is located. However, the current implementation uses `getToken(index - 1).getLine()` which gets the line of the last successfully parsed token (which could be the left parenthesis or a parameter), not the line of the last non-terminal before the missing right parenthesis. In the test case `void f(int a {}`, the missing right parenthesis after `int a` should report line 1, but the code may report an incorrect line number.]
